'''Wuvnir''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[General/Legends|general]], who was captured alongside General [[Tfin]] by bounty hunter [[Kal-tan-shi]] on [[Yhuli Docking Port 32|Yuhli Docking Port 32]] sometime before [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].<ref name="AIR" />

{{Char-stub}}
